original_text:
### Gradient Specifications (approved set вЂ” never invent gradients)
| Gradient | Stops | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Brand Blue в†’ Dark Navy | `#00529b` в†’ `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves |
| Sky Blue в†’ Deep Blue | `#358CCB` в†’ `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves |
| Sunshine в†’ 75% Gold | `#faa31b` в†’ Gold @75% | Warm backgrounds |
| Golden Sand в†’ White в†’ Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` в†’ `#ffffff` в†’ `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds |
| Golden Sand в†’ 75% Gold в†’ Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` в†’ Gold @75% в†’ `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds |
| Sunshine в†’ 0C,10M,78Y,0K (в‰€`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` в†’ light gold | **Masthead gradient вЂ” the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
- Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated в†’ light, left в†’ right as shown).
- Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

relations.note: Defines the approved Sunshine-to-light-gold exception-specific masthead treatment when the logo mark is present.
The logo masthead gradient also follows the masthead horizontal direction rule.

| Sunshine в†’ 0C,10M,78Y,0K (в‰€`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` в†’ light gold | **Masthead gradient вЂ” the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

rules.intent: Preserve the finite, approved gradient palette and its designated background treatments.
rules.rule_text: Use only the approved gradient set; never invent gradients. The approved applications are Brand Blue в†’ Dark Navy (#00529b в†’ #011E45) for dark backgrounds and blue mastheads/waves; Sky Blue в†’ Deep Blue for blue backgrounds and waves; Sunshine в†’ 75% Gold for warm backgrounds; Golden Sand в†’ White в†’ Light Blue for soft light backgrounds; Golden Sand в†’ 75% Gold в†’ Sunshine for warm light-to-saturated backgrounds; and Sunshine в†’ light gold (#faa31b в†’ в‰€#ffe05c) for the masthead/logo treatment. Gradients may be used as backgrounds, with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark.

quotes: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated в†’ light, left в†’ right as shown).
Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated в†’ light, left в†’ right as shown).

rules.intent: Maintain the approved directional progression of masthead and banner gradients.
rules.rule_text: In masthead and banner applications, gradients run horizontally from dark/saturated to light, left to right as shown.

quotes: **Masthead gradient вЂ” the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end**
| Sunshine в†’ 0C,10M,78Y,0K (в‰€`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` в†’ light gold | **Masthead gradient вЂ” the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |

rules.intent: Ensure contrast and correct logo placement in the designated masthead treatment.
rules.rule_text: For a masthead with the LISRAYA logo mark, use the Sunshine в†’ light gold gradient (#faa31b в†’ в‰€#ffe05c) for contrast, with the mark at the lightest end.

rules.intent: Bind the Gradient Specifications (approved set вЂ” never invent gradients) table values verbatim.
rules.rule_text:
The Gradient Specifications (approved set вЂ” never invent gradients) table is a closed, brand-approved set; every row binds its listed values exactly as specified. Do not invent or alter rows.

| Gradient | Stops | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Brand Blue в†’ Dark Navy | `#00529b` в†’ `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves |
| Sky Blue в†’ Deep Blue | `#358CCB` в†’ `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves |
| Sunshine в†’ 75% Gold | `#faa31b` в†’ Gold @75% | Warm backgrounds |
| Golden Sand в†’ White в†’ Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` в†’ `#ffffff` в†’ `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds |
| Golden Sand в†’ 75% Gold в†’ Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` в†’ Gold @75% в†’ `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds |
| Sunshine в†’ 0C,10M,78Y,0K (в‰€`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` в†’ light gold | **Masthead gradient вЂ” the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
